lint.note: 0 errors, 3 warnings (complexity warnings in compareQuotes and handleRequest — pre-existing pattern)

appliedUpdates.description: Updated stale token display format doc from '0xABCD...1234' to 'full 42-char address, never truncated', added note about dead code path in extractAddressFromInput
Added /tokenlist/proxy endpoint to the API endpoints list with behavioral description
Added codebase quirk: updateTransactionActionStates() broadly re-enables all .tx-btn buttons on wallet connect, overriding the step-indicator's intentional disabled state on the Swap button
Documented that data/tokenlist.json is untracked, created by init.sh, not included in Docker image — /tokenlist returns 500 in Docker without volume mount

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: all new server endpoints must include observability calls — recordRequest(), logError() on errors, trackError() for error metrics. Pattern already used by /quote, /compare, /tokenlist but missing from the new /tokenlist/proxy endpoint.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature custom-tokenlist-url added /tokenlist/proxy without any observability calls. All other non-trivial endpoints (/quote at line ~3173, /compare at ~3222, /tokenlist at ~3118) call recordRequest(), logError(), and/or trackError(). Without documented convention, workers consistently omit this.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add accessibility convention: all form inputs must have a <label for="id"> element (not a <span>). Currently AGENTS.md has no guidance on form accessibility. The slippage field's label was changed to <span> in form-ux-improvements, breaking programmatic label association.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature form-ux-improvements replaced <label for="slippageBps"> with <span class="slippage-label">. Every other form field (chain, tokenlist URL, from token, amount, to token) retains a proper <label>. Worker had no explicit guidance to preserve this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add security note: server-side proxy endpoints must validate that resolved hostnames are not private/internal IP ranges (SSRF). The /tokenlist/proxy endpoint currently only checks url.protocol === 'https:' but does not block private IP ranges (10.x, 172.16.x, 192.168.x, 127.0.0.1, ::1). Low risk for a developer tool, but the pattern should be documented before more proxy endpoints are added.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature custom-tokenlist-url added /tokenlist/proxy without SSRF IP filtering. The feature description only required HTTPS validation. Security convention should be proactive, not reactive.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md API Endpoints section does not list GET /tokenlist/proxy
rejectedObservations.reason: The AGENTS.md endpoint list documents existing stable endpoints, not implementation details. The new endpoint is documented in library/architecture.md. Updating AGENTS.md itself is an orchestrator decision — recommending it above as a suggestedGuidanceUpdate instead.

rejectedObservations.observation: readme-screenshot: fullstack-worker skill's test-first approach doesn't apply to documentation-only tasks
rejectedObservations.reason: The skill already has a 'client-side-only changes' clause that covers this case. No change needed to skill or AGENTS.md — the worker handled it correctly.
